from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path


def repeated_stat_or_exists_calls_before_single_followup_operation_positive(path):
    file_path = Path(path)
    if file_path.exists() and file_path.exists() and file_path.stat().st_size > 0:
        return file_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    return ""
